prompt: Generate a clean screenshot of a dark-themed e-commerce dashboard displaying sales data. Utilize the modern design layout, dark color palette, and graphic elements inspired by the reference image to create the interface.
prompt_refined: Generate a clean screenshot of a dark-themed e-commerce dashboard, displaying detailed sales and financial data. Emulate the modern design layout, dark color palette, and graphic elements from image 1. The interface should feature a prominent left navigation sidebar, a top header bar with a search input and utility icons, and a main content area organized into distinct data widgets. These widgets should include: 'Total Earning' and 'Total Order' summaries with corresponding values and a small trend line; a large central stacked bar chart visualizing monthly 'Investment', 'Loss', 'Profit', and 'Maintenance' data; and a 'Popular Stocks' section on the right displaying stock performance with an accompanying area chart.
objects: 'Total Earning' summary widget with value and small trend line
'Total Order' summary widget with value and small trend line
large central stacked bar chart visualizing monthly 'Investment', 'Loss', 'Profit', and 'Maintenance' data
